title: taraxacum viridans
intro: Taraxacum viridans, also known as the lesser dandelion or green dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family that resembles the common dandelion but has leaves with a more delicate and green color. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum viridans include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum viridans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused in hot water, or added to food and drinks as a supplement to reap its numerous health benefits.
